projects.title: Pre-Chamber Nozzle Insert
projects.description: Custom M14x1.25-to-M10x1.0 spark-plug pre-chamber / jet-ignition nozzle insert. Reverse-engineered starter CAD with BOSL2 helical threads, selectable original/corrected hex and collar dimensions, conical nozzle tip, 2.5 mm axial orifice, and angled 2.5/1.0 mm side jet holes. SCAD source included alongside the pre-rendered metal GLB.
projects.author: Reverse-engineered starter CAD

projects.title: Pre-Chamber Nozzle Insert (OCCT)
projects.description: OpenCASCADE variant of the pre-chamber nozzle insert with conical nose, thread envelope, collar, hex, axial bore, and angled jet holes.
projects.author: Reverse-engineered starter CAD
